response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep hands-on work with TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and open-source AI-agent tooling, including MCP frameworks — aligning well with core requirements. However, he lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders, which are critical for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks in production.
Strong cloud and DevOps background with AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes.
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and mentoring.
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production AI systems or GenAI deployment.
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM evaluation pipelines.
Limited documentation of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or stakeholder discovery.
